audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass allows patrons to purchase a Heritage Pass , Combination Pass , or Plimoth Patuxet Only pass for up to six individuals at the reduced rate of $18 per adult; $12 per child ages 5-17. Not combinable with any other discount. Tickets must be purchased in person at the Museu

This pass allows patrons to purchase a Heritage Pass , Combination Pass , or Plimoth Patuxet Only pass for up to six individuals at the reduced rate of $18 per adult; $12 per child ages 5-17. Not combinable with any other discount. Tickets must be purchased in person at the Museu

coupon.source_phrase_block: This pass allows patrons to purchase a Heritage Pass , Combination Pass , or Plimoth Patuxet Only pass for up to six individuals at the reduced rate of $18 per adult; $12 per child ages 5-17. Not combinable with any other discount. Tickets must be purchased in person at the Museum in order to receive the discount. No online ticket sales.
